task_completion.description: Log into the wger fitness manager as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the wger fitness manager interface at http://localhost, with indications of being logged in (e.g., dashboard view, user menu showing 'admin').

task_completion.description: Locate and view the '5x5 Beginner' routine to determine its End Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '5x5 Beginner' routine page or a schedule list showing its scheduled End Date is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new training routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Add routine' or 'New routine' form in the wger web interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Enter the name 'Intermediate Hypertrophy' for the new routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Intermediate Hypertrophy' is typed into the routine name input field.

task_completion.description: Set the Start Date of the new routine to exactly one calendar day after the End Date of '5x5 Beginner'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date field in the new routine form is filled with a date that is exactly one calendar day after the End Date seen for '5x5 Beginner', and the routine is saved or submitted.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the wger application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the wger interface at http://localhost, not terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to modify the database directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or Django shell scripts modifying the wger database.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely filled out the routine creation form in the web UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual wger web form being filled out and submitted, rather than editing HTML source or using a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The prerequisite routine is named '5x5 Beginner'. The agent must check its end date. The new routine must be named exactly 'Intermediate Hypertrophy'. Its start date must be exactly one calendar day after the '5x5 Beginner' end date.
